season.label: Winter 2026
season.note: Picks for the long evenings, chosen by Lucia and Linnea.

pick.title: Vinterspar
pick.author: Maja Lindstrom
pick.note: A debut of rare discipline. Plain prose that accumulates after the last page.

pick.title: Solvinden
pick.author: Sofia Nyman
pick.note: Local author, quiet and exact. She reads from it at the shop on 22 February.

pick.title: Det finska rummet
pick.author: Anna-Kaisa Virtanen
pick.note: Interior prose, very still. The Finnish-Swedish connection feels stronger this year.

pick.title: Night Sky with Exit Wounds
pick.author: Ocean Vuong
pick.note: The poetry shelf has been neglected. This is where to start again.

pick.title: The Rings of Saturn
pick.author: W. G. Sebald
pick.note: Walk the route in your head. A book to read slowly through February.

season.label: Autumn 2025
season.note: The titles that carried the strongest quarter on record.

pick.title: Drommfakulteten
pick.author: Sara Stridsberg
pick.note: Reread for the third time. Always something new in it.

pick.title: Havet inom
pick.author: Anders Lilja
pick.note: Strong sales on the night of his September reading. Thirty-eight in the room.
